# The Causal Inference Framework

::: {.callout-note}
## Drafting note
Chapter content in progress. Migrate the corresponding text here; use `$...$` / `$$...$$` for math, place figures in `images/`, and use ```{r} or ```{python} code blocks.
:::

## Individual causal effects

_To be added._

## Causation and correlation

_To be added._

## Simpson's paradox

_To be added._

## Average causal effects

_To be added._

## Conditions for identifying average causal effects

_To be added._
